provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly item concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi equipment, visible material texture and surface detail, visible brushstrokes, centered item on plain dark grey background, studio lighting, collapsible chrome weapon with smooth elliptical grip and retractable teal-tipped stun element, looks like a tool repurposed as weapon — because it is, no blade or projectile — purely electrical, designed for defense not offense, reluctantly carried by pacifist traders
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new, hands holding item, person, character, environmental background, multiple items, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, video game icon, UI element

judgment.explanation: Equipment/weapon with faction-specific design language, wear marks, and functional design.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Not generic sci-fi — reads as faction-specific and lived-in

canon_assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones

canon_explanation: Approved: passes 8/8 constitution rules.  Equipment/weapon with faction-specific design language, wear marks, and functional design.
